Uses of Interface
javax.media.mscontrol.Value

Packages that use Value
javax.media.mscontrol Provides a java Application Server with a Media Server Control API. 
javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup A MediaGroup is mostly a player/recorder. 
javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.http Mediagroup parameters specialized for HTTP file play and record 
javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals provides resources for detecting and generating signals: DTMF, speech, .... for any type of media 
javax.media.mscontrol.resource This package provides the base definitions for managing media processing resources. 
 

Uses of Value in javax.media.mscontrol
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol that return types with arguments of type Value
 java.util.Set<Value> SupportedFeatures.getSupportedValues()
          Provide the Set of supported Values.
 

Uses of Value in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup
 

Fields in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup declared as Value
static Value CodecConstants.ADPCM_16K_G726
          G726 16k
static Value CodecConstants.ADPCM_32K
          ADPCM
static Value CodecConstants.ADPCM_32K_G726
          G726 32k
static Value CodecConstants.ADPCM_32K_OKI
          ADPCM Oki, a.k.a. vox files
static Value CodecConstants.ALAW_PCM_48K
           
static Value CodecConstants.ALAW_PCM_64K
          Alaw PCM (mimetype: pcma)
static Value CodecConstants.AMR
          AMR (narrow band)
static Value CodecConstants.AMR_WB
          AMR wideband
static Value Recorder.DETECT_ALL_OCCURRENCES
          value for Recorder.SPEECH_DETECTION_MODE.
static Value Recorder.DETECT_FIRST_OCCURRENCE
          value for Recorder.SPEECH_DETECTION_MODE.
static Value Recorder.DETECTOR_INACTIVE
          value for Recorder.SPEECH_DETECTION_MODE.
static Value CodecConstants.EVRC
          EVRC codec
static Value Player.FAIL_IF_BUSY
          value for BEHAVIOUR_IF_BUSY: signal an error, throw a MediaResourceException.
static Value FileFormatConstants.FORMAT_3G2
          3gpp2 files format.
static Value FileFormatConstants.FORMAT_3GP
          3gp files format.
static Value CodecConstants.G723_1B
          G.723 codec
Valid fmtp values, per rfc 3555, paragraph 4.1.3: "bitrate=6.3" or "bitrate="5.3" "annexa=yes" (default) or "annexa=no" Those values may be assigned to Recorder.AUDIO_FMTP.
static Value CodecConstants.G729_A
          G.729 codec
Valid fmtp values, per rfc 3555, paragraph 4.1.9: "annexb=yes" (default) or "annexb=no" Those values may be assigned to Recorder.AUDIO_FMTP.
static Value CodecConstants.GSM
          GSM codec
static Value FileFormatConstants.GSM
          GSM file format.
static Value CodecConstants.H263
          Value for VIDEO_CODEC.
static Value CodecConstants.H263_1998
          Value for VIDEO_CODEC.
static Value CodecConstants.H264
          Value for VIDEO_CODEC.
static Value CodecConstants.INFERRED
          If Player.AUDIO_CODEC is set to this Value, it indicates that the encoding must be read from the file header.
static Value FileFormatConstants.INFERRED
          If Player.FILE_FORMAT or Recorder.FILE_FORMAT is set to this Value, it indicates that the container type must be inferred from the file name extension (.wav -> WAV_FORMAT, etc..).
static Value CodecConstants.LINEAR_16BIT_128K
          16bits, linear, 8000 samples/second, 128 kbits/s
static Value CodecConstants.LINEAR_16BIT_256K
          16bits, linear, 16000 samples/second, 256kbits/s
static Value CodecConstants.LINEAR_8BIT_64K
          8bits, linear, 8000 samples/second, 64kbits/s
static Value CodecConstants.MP4V_ES
          Value for VIDEO_CODEC.
static Value CodecConstants.MULAW_PCM_64K
          Mulaw PCM (mimetype: pcmu)
static Value Player.QUEUE_IF_BUSY
          value for BEHAVIOUR_IF_BUSY: wait for previous requests to complete.
static Value FileFormatConstants.RAW
          Basic file format without any header.
static Value Player.STOP_IF_BUSY
          value for BEHAVIOUR_IF_BUSY: stop any previous play.
static Value FileFormatConstants.WAV
          WAV file format.

          Value for CED. 2100Hz tone answer to SignalConstants.CNG_TONE.
static Value SignalConstants.CNG_TONE
          Value for CNG. 1100Hz tone answered by SignalConstants.CED_TONE.

          A predefined pattern that matches the end of a speech sequence.
static Value SpeechRecognitionEvent.START_OF_SPEECH
          A predefined pattern that matches the start of a speech sequence.
static Value SignalConstants.VFU_REQUEST
          Value representing a request for a VideoFastUpdate.

          Get array of matched signal names.
